## Checklist

- [ ] `task check` passes locally (typecheck + lint + test)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the behaviour I changed
- [ ] I preserved the architecture invariants (memory holds _why_, tracker holds
      _what + status_; tracker vocabulary stays neutral; memory writes stay
      type-addressable) — see CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Docs / `.env.example` updated if configuration or behaviour changed
